Add Your Content Here

= LemonNinja =
:   :   Location: Berne, Switzerland
    :   Gender: Male
    :   Year of Birth: 1992
    :   Playing since: 2004
    :   Current stats: pretty inactive at the moment...
    :   Settings played: All (mainly Liero 1.0)

== General ==
LemonNinja is one of the leaders of the [leke] clan. ([leke] has two leaders, LemonNinja and GrassNinja) He likes to play 3 x Barret and 2 x Frag Grenade/Desert Eagle at 20% loading time in big levels (some kind of insider mode ("snipers")) and eating Chilli con carne. That's about it...

== Clan History ==
* [leke] Leader since 2005 ([leke] will never die!)

[[Category:Players]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721182843/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/LemonNinja -->
